description: Lightweight client-side router for WebUI apps. Intercepts navigation, matches routes locally or via server route-data, and hydrates components.
name: @microsoft/webui-router

scripts.test: esbuild test/navigation-path.test.ts test/inventory.test.ts --bundle --outdir=test/dist --format=esm --platform=node && esbuild test/browser-shim.ts test/router.test.ts --bundle --outdir=test/dist --format=esm --platform=node && node --test test/dist/navigation-path.test.js test/dist/inventory.test.js test/dist/router.test.js
